calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2007 Off Calendar

Prove-Up Hearing In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-23-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales, CSR: Beldon Yee.
C. Andrew Gibson, Esq., for Plaintiff: McMillan Bros. Electric, Inc.
Order for waiver of witness appearance at default prove up hearing on file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Parish Construction and Aaron Matthew Parish as follows:
Damages/Principal $69,262.75
Prejudgment Interest $8,140.16
Attorney's Fees $16,983.0
Statutory Penalties $18,323.01
Costs $1,429.47, for a total of $114,138.39.
Judgment signed in open court.
